subject: FW:
body:
From: Sean J. Lancaster [mailto:slancaster@bristolassociates.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, January 16, 2008 4:08 PM
To: 'Darren Indyke'; lvjet@aol.com; Lesley Groff
Subject: 
Sensitivity: Confidential

 

Larry I wanted to send you and update of the S76C++ marketing.  We
continue to get calls on the aircraft each day.  At the moment we have
two prospects for the aircraft. 

 

Mr. Daniel Snyder, the Chairman of Six Flags and the owner of the
Washington Redskins Football Team.  We have been told he will be making
a decision within weeks.  He has all the data on the aircraft and is
aware of its location.  

 

Mr. Alan Fort of Aviation Solutions,   Alan has a mandate to purchase an
aircraft for a Head of State.  Aviation Solutions is known to us as we
work them on the commercial side of our business.  He tells me feels
that within a month funding and final approvals will be in place.  

 

I will keep you informed

 

 

 

Best regards 

 

 

Sean J. Lancaster

Bristol Associates Inc.

1-540-665-5135 direct

1-202-682-4000 ext 1130 Main Office

1-540-533-8183 Mobile

1-540-301-0050 FAX

slancaster@bristolassociates.com
<mailto:slancaster@bristolassociates.com> 

www.bristolassociates.com <http://www.bristolassociates.com>  

 

This message may contain confidential and/or legally privileged
information.  If you are not the intended recipient of the message,
please destroy it. Any unauthorized dissemination, distribution or
copying of the material in this message, and any attachments to the
message, is strictly forbidden. (c) 2007 all rights reserved.

From: Sean J. Lancaster [mailto:slancaster@bristolassociates.com]
Sent: Wednesday, January 16, 2008 4:08 PM
To: 'Darren Indyke'; lvjet@aol.com; Lesley Groff
Subject:
Sensitivity: Confidential

 

Larry I wanted to send you and update of the S76C++ marketing.  We continue to get calls on the aircraft each day.  At the moment we have two prospects for the aircraft.

 

Mr. Daniel Snyder, the Chairman of Six Flags and the owner of the Washington Redskins Football Team.  We have been told he will be making a decision within weeks.  He has all the data on the aircraft and is aware of its location. 

 

Mr. Alan Fort of Aviation Solutions,   Alan has a mandate to purchase an aircraft for a Head of State.  Aviation Solutions is known to us as we work them on the commercial side of our business.  He tells me feels that within a month funding and final approvals will be in place. 

 

I will keep you informed

 

 

 

Best regards

 

 

Sean J. Lancaster
